The '''2018 season''' was the '''[[Castleford Tigers]]'''' 93rd season in the [[Rugby Football League]] and their 11th consecutive season in the top flight of [[Rugby league in England|English rugby league]]. The club competed in the [[2018 Super League season|2018 Super League]] and the [[2018 Challenge Cup]].
